# ai-plugins Distribution PR

## Source

- Agent Kit source commit:
- Agent Kit source PR:
- Generated by workflow: yes / no

> Agent behavior, source recipes, generated package shape, guardrails, tests,
> and provenance are owned by
> [The Endor Labs Agent Kit](https://github.com/endorlabs/endor-labs-agent-kit/tree/main).

## Allowed Change Type

- [ ] Generated Agent Kit distribution sync from a merged Agent Kit source PR
- [ ] Distribution-only metadata or documentation for this mirror
- [ ] Emergency correction approved by Agent Kit and distribution maintainers

## Generated Sync Checks

- [ ] `plugins/` mirrors Agent Kit generated `plugins/`
- [ ] `.cursor-plugin/`, root `agents/`, root `skills/`, root `hooks/`, `cursor-sdk/`, and `assets/logo.png` mirror Agent Kit generated output
- [ ] `provenance/agent-kit-catalog.intoto.json` is present for generated sync PRs
- [ ] `provenance/manifest.sha256` is present for generated sync PRs
- [ ] No agent behavior was edited directly in this repo

## Validation

- [ ] Root skill quick validation passed
- [ ] JSON metadata validation passed
- [ ] Cursor SDK compile check passed
- [ ] Gemini no-zip check passed
- [ ] `git diff --check` passed

## Maintainer Notes

Direct PRs that add or change agents, skills, hooks, action contracts, or
generated package behavior should be redirected to Agent Kit source first.
